debug_info.goal:
m : ℕ
hm : 2 ≤ m
A : Finset ℤ
B : Fin m → Finset ℤ
hBA : ∀ (i : Fin m), B i ⊆ A
hB : ∀ (k : Fin m), ∑ i ∈ B k, i = ↑m ^ (↑k + 1)
⊢ ↑m / 2 ≤ ↑A.card

failed_attempts:
by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  rw [div_lt_iff' (by norm_num)] at h
  norm_cast at h
  let n := A.card
  let K := 2 * n + 1
  have hK : K ≤ m := Nat.succ_le_of_lt h
  have hn : 0 < n := by
    by_contra hn0
    simp at hn0
    have : A = ∅ := Finset.card_eq_zero.mp hn0
    specialize hB 0
    rw [this, Finset.sum_empty] at hB
    simp at hB
    linarith
  have hK_gt_1 : 1 < K := by simp [K]; linarith
  let dom := Fin K → Fin K
  let cod := A → Fin (K * K)
  let f : dom → cod := fun c x =>
    let val := ∑ i : Fin K, (c i : ℕ) * (if x ∈ B (i.castLE hK) then 1 else 0)
    ⟨val, by
      calc val ≤ ∑ i : Fin K, (K - 1) * 1 := Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => by
             apply mul_le_mul
             · apply Nat.le_pred_of_lt; exact Fin.is_lt (c i)
             · split_ifs <;> norm_num
             · split_ifs <;> norm_num
             · apply Nat.zero_le
           _ = K * (K - 1) := by simp
           _ < K * K := by
             apply Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left
             · apply Nat.sub_lt; linarith; norm_num
             · linarith
    ⟩
  have h_card : Fintype.card cod < Fintype.card dom := by
    simp only [cod, dom, Fintype.card_fun, Fintype.card_fin, n]
    rw [pow_mul, ← pow_mul']
    apply pow_lt_pow_right hK_gt_1
    have : 2 * n = K - 1 := by simp [K]
    rw [this]
    apply Nat.sub_lt; linarith; norm_num
  obtain ⟨c1, c2, hne, heq⟩ := Fintype.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt f h_card
  let d := fun i => (c1 i : ℤ) - (c2 i : ℤ)
  have h_sum : ∑ i : Fin K, d i * m ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) = 0 := by
    have h_eq_x : ∀ x ∈ A, (f c1 x).1 = (f c2 x).1 := fun x _ => by rw [heq]
    have : ∑ x ∈ A, x * (f c1 x).1 = ∑ x ∈ A, x * (f c2 x).1 := Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun x hx => by rw [h_eq_x x hx])
    simp only [f, mul_sum] at this
    simp only [sum_mul] at this
    rw [Finset.sum_comm] at this; nth_rw 2 [Finset.sum_comm] at this
    simp only [Finset.sum_ite, Finset.sum_const_zero, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one, add_zero] at this
    have h_inner : ∀ i, ∑ x ∈ (B (Fin.castLE hK i)), x = m ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) := fun i => hB (Fin.castLE hK i)
    conv at this =>
      lhs; congr; rfl; intro i _; rw [Finset.inter_eq_right.mpr (hBA _), h_inner]
    conv at this =>
      rhs; congr; rfl; intro i _; rw [Finset.inter_eq_right.mpr (hBA _), h_inner]
    rw [← sub_eq_zero] at this
    rw [← Finset.sum_sub_distrib] at this
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro i _
    rw [← sub_mul]
    rfl
  let S := {i : Fin K | d i ≠ 0}
  have hS_nonempty : S.Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_empty
    simp at h_empty
    apply hne
    ext i
    specialize h_empty i
    simp [d] at h_empty
    linarith
  let j := S.min' hS_nonempty
  have hj : d j ≠ 0 := S.min'_mem hS_nonempty
  have hj_min : ∀ i : Fin K, (i : ℕ) < j → d i = 0 := fun i hi => by
    by_contra hdi
    have : i ∈ S := hdi
    have : j ≤ i := S.min'_le this
    linarith
  rw [← Finset.sum_filter_add_sum_filter_not (· < j) (Finset.univ)] at h_sum
  simp only [hj_min, zero_mul, Finset.sum_const_zero, zero_add] at h_sum
  rw [Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton (S.min'_mem hS_nonempty)] at h_sum
  have h_factor : ∀ i ∈ Finset.univ.filter (¬· < j) \ {j}, ∃ z : ℤ, (m : ℤ) ^ ((i : ℕ) + 1) = (m : ℤ) ^ ((j : ℕ) + 1) * m * z := by
    intro i hi
    simp at hi
    use (m : ℤ) ^ ((i : ℕ) - j - 1)
    rw [← pow_add, ← mul_assoc, ← pow_succ]
    congr
    omega
  rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i hi => by 
    obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := h_factor i hi
    rw [hz, mul_assoc, ← mul_assoc (d i), mul_assoc _ (m : ℤ) z]
    )] at h_sum
  rw [← mul_add, ← mul_add] at h_sum
  have hm_pow_pos : (m : ℤ) ^ ((j : ℕ) + 1) ≠ 0 := pow_ne_zero _ (Int.ofNat_ne_zero.mpr (by linarith))
  rw [mul_eq_zero] at h_sum
  cases h_sum with
  | inl h => contradiction
  | inr h =>
    rw [add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg] at h
    have : (m : ℤ) ∣ d j := by
      rw [h]
      exact dvd_neg (dvd_mul_right _ _)
    have h_abs : |d j| < m := by
      rw [abs_lt]
      constructor <;> {
        simp only [d]
        have h1 : (c1 j : ℤ) < K := Int.ofNat_lt_ofNat_of_lt (Fin.is_lt (c1 j))
        have h2 : (c2 j : ℤ) < K := Int.ofNat_lt_ofNat_of_lt (Fin.is_lt (c2 j))
        linarith
      }
    apply Int.eq_zero_of_dvd_of_abs_lt_abs this h_abs at hj
    contradiction
